page: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel processor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyperthreading enabled, providing two threads per core. The memory configuration delivers 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The CPU architecture includes a 260 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. This instance type does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance in memory-intensive and multi-threaded operations. The server achieves top-tier results in large-block memory bandwidth, with read-only speeds at 254.09 GB/sec and write speeds at 113.1 GB/sec. CPU-bound workloads benefit from advanced instruction sets, as evidenced by strong scores in Passmark CPU tests, encryption, and physics. Additionally, the system demonstrates strong performance in database operations and static web serving throughput, while single-core performance and smaller-block memory caching fall within the average range.

The Intel processor supports Advanced Vector Extensions and Advanced Matrix Extensions, which accelerate cryptographic and mathematical operations. This hardware acceleration supports strong performance in small-to-medium model LLM prompt processing, reaching 2234.41 tokens/sec for a 135M model and 179.15 tokens/sec for a 7B model. Given the high vCPU-to-RAM ratio and strong database and memory bandwidth benchmarks, this server is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, large-scale text processing, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: The Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an x86_64 server configured with 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high-density memory profile of 8.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show strong capabilities in large-block memory bandwidth, with read speeds of 254.09 GB/sec and write speeds of 113.1 GB/sec, alongside strong Passmark database operations and CPU encryption scores. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, which drive strong performance in small-to-medium LLM prompt processing. This server is optimized for memory-intensive applications, database management, and CPU-based machine learning inference workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an x86_64 server with 48 Intel vCPUs and 384 GB RAM. It delivers strong large-block memory bandwidth and database performance for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4-highmem-48 is an x86_64 server featuring 48 Intel vCPUs and 384 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A high-memory x86_64 server featuring advanced Intel matrix extensions, optimized for memory-intensive database operations and CPU-based inference workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM
Strong large-block memory read and write bandwidth
Intel AMX and AVX-512 hardware acceleration support
Strong performance in database operations and static web serving
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and CPU-based LLM inference
